title: OHP AND SNAP ENROLLMENT ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: ALBANY OFFICE OHP AND SNAP ENROLLMENT ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps older adults and adults with disabilities apply and enroll in Medicaid and Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP). 1400 Queen Avenue SE Suite 201 Albany, OR 97322 Eligibility: -For assistance enrolling in Medicaid: Age 65 and older and adults with disabilities receiving disability benefits -For assistance with SNAP/food stamps: Age 60 and older and adults with disabilities receiving disability benefits -Eligibility for both programs is determined on a case-by-case basis Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 967-8630 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 967-8630 Toll-free (800) 638-0510 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment and information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of income, identity, and other documents may be required LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Linn County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located between Geary Street and Hill Street in a 2-story red brick building Services: Food Stamps/SNAP * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Food Stamps/SNAP * Older Adults Medicaid * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Medicaid * Older Adults Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - AREA AGENCY ON AGING HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - AGING AND DISABILITY RESOURCE CONNECTION HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - SENIOR HEALTH INSURANCE BENEFITS ASSISTANCE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - ADULT PROTECTIVE SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OPTIONS COUNSELING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE INFORMATION SERVICES - FAMILY CAREGIVER SUPPORT PROGRAM MONEY MANAGEMENT - MONEY MANAGEMENT PROGRAM MONEY MANAGEMENT - STAND BY ME TRANSPORTATION - CASCADES WEST RIDE LINE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ALBANY OFFICE
